title: Ghostly
description: This mod only adds a new potion effect called "Ghost", which makes the player invisible but unable to be detected by monsters, mining blocks or attacking mobs will cause the effect to wear off.
body:
This mod only adds a new potion effect called "Ghost", which makes the player invisible but unable to be detected by monsters, mining blocks or attacking mobs will cause the effect to wear off.

 

The author's comments:

This mod is designed for modpack creation.

 

Commond：

/effect @p ghostly:ghostly 30 0
